Off Calendar Sep-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Ernesto Sanchez of the law offices of Liberation Law Group PC (415-695-1000) appears as counsel for plaintiffs/moving parties

Attorneys, Emily A. Mertes and Barbara L. Harris-Chiang of the law offices of Kaufman Dolowich & Voluck LLP (415-926-7610) appear as counsels for defendant/opposing party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

PLAINTIFFS DAVID HAU, ERIK JAVIER CHIN and JOSE BRICENOS' Motion For Approval Of PAGA Penalties Pursuant To Labor Code Section 2699 is DENIED without prejudice to re-filing with an explanation as to why the named plaintiffs are receiving a disproportionate amount of settlement. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Gena Eales, CSR No. 9176, e-mail: geales@sftc.org. (L&M302)

PLAINTIFFS DAVID CANCHE HAU, ERIK CHIN, JOSE BRICENOS, AND DEFENDANT BUENA LANE PARTNERS, LLC's Joint Motion For Approval Of Paga Penalties Pursuant To Labor Code Section 2699 is Denied without Prejudice of being refiled.
